text:
Medi-Cal Support Services | Madera County
CalViva Health
Transportation Services
Your CalViva Health plan covers rides when you need health care and services. This is also known as, routine medical transportation.
Learn more about CalViva's transportation services:
English
|
Spanish
Medi-Cal Health Advice Line
CalViva members have access the medical advice. To talk to someone regarding a health concern please call:
CalViva/Health
Net Health advice
line:
1-888-893-1569
Choose "member" (press 1), then select "nurse 24-hour advice line" (press 5)
TTY 711
Other Health Resources
Enhanced Care Management (ECM)
offers extra services at no cost to Medi-Cal members who have complex needs and challenges that make it hard to improve their health.
Learn more about (ECM)
Community Supports
are new services provided by local organizations to help every person reach their full health potential. CalViva Health members have access to these optional Community Supports services.
Learn more about (ECM)
Programs and Services for CalViva Health Members,
health education services, programs and
resources -
English
|
Spanish

Control Your Pain Safely
Flyer -

Truth About Prescription Painkillers
Flyer -
English

Spanish
Need an Interpreter
You can get an interpreter when you talk with your doctor or any health care provider. Interpreter services are here for you 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. CalViva Health offers telephone, video and in person interpreters at no cost.
CalViva Interpreter Services Flyer
Anthem Blue Cross
Transportation Services
Your Anthem BlueCross Health plan covers rides when you need health care and services. This is also known as, routine medical transportation.
Learn more about Anthem BlueCross's transportation services: Anthem Transportation Flyer -
English
|
Spanish
California Medicaid Anthem Advice Line
Anthem BlueCross members have access the medical advice. To talk to someone regarding a health concern please call:
California Medicaid Anthem
advice line:  1-800-224-0336
TTY 1-800-368-4424
24/7 Nurseline Flyer
English
|
Spanish
LiveHealth Online Flyer
-
English
|
Spanish
Help Manage Your Healthcare
As your health plan, Anthem BlueCross has a team of community health workers to connect you with available resources in your community.
Managing Your Healthcare Flyer -
English
|
Spanish
To request a community health worker at no charge to you, please call the Special Program Line at 833-884-0385.
Need an Interpreter
You can get an interpreter when you talk with your doctor or any health care provider. Interpreter services are here for you 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. Anthem BlueCross provides interpreting services for your medical appointments and materials in other languages and formats, including braille, large print, and audio at no cost.
Interpreter and Translation Services Flyer
